task: Configure VLC's default stream output (sout) to stream media as HTTP on port 8080 with a TS mux. Set the 'sout' preference to '#http{mux=ts,dst=:8080/}' in VLC's advanced preferences so it persists in ~/.config/vlc/vlcrc. Save preferences, then start streaming /home/user/Videos/sample.mp4.

verification.description: sout config contains http output on port 8080
